gold_answer: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years, and the offender shall also be liable to fine.

results.claim_text: Imprisonment may extend to ten years
results.best_matching_sentence: According to section 69, the punishment for having sexual intercourse with a woman by deceitful means or a false promise of marriage, where it does not amount to rape, is imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years and shall also be liable to fine [Chunk-ID: a83c2bce-ea76-4859-9604-7f1b9d86d751].

results.claim_text: The offender shall be liable to fine
